seo.title: Mi Inventario — Inventory Software | Resoria
seo.description: Discover Mi Inventario: stock control, alerts and reports. Screenshots, tutorials and success stories.

whatIs.title: What is Mi Inventario?
paragraphs: Mi Inventario is a system to control stock in your store, warehouse, hardware shop or pharmacy with precision.
Track stock in and out, get low-stock alerts and generate reports to know what to restock and when. Works locally or in the cloud depending on your plan.

whoIsItFor.title: Who is it for?
whoIsItFor.subtitle: If you buy and sell products and need precise stock control, Mi Inventario is your solution.

items.title: Always up-to-date stock
items.description: Every stock in and out is recorded. You know exactly how much you have of each product.

items.title: Avoid stockouts
items.description: Automatic alerts when a product is running low so you restock on time.
items.imageAlt: Store shelf with few products remaining

items.title: Less loss and shrinkage
items.description: Spot discrepancies, slow movers and excess stock before they cost you money.
items.imageAlt: Worker checking inventory in a warehouse

items.title: Reports to decide
items.description: Check movements, inventory value and best sellers in seconds.
items.imageAlt: Dashboard with business reports and statistics

items.title: Save operational time
items.description: Forget spreadsheets and manual counts that eat hours every week.
items.imageAlt: Worker scanning products in a warehouse

items.title: Multi-location ready
items.description: Manage multiple stores or warehouses from one centralized system.
items.imageAlt: Logistics hub with multiple storage locations

steps.title: 1. Register products
steps.description: Load your catalog with codes, categories, prices and minimum stock levels.

steps.title: 2. Stock in and out
steps.description: Record purchases, sales and adjustments. Stock updates automatically.
steps.imageAlt: Goods moving in and out of a warehouse

steps.title: 3. Smart alerts
steps.description: Get notified when a product is running low or exceeds ideal stock.
steps.imageAlt: Shelf with few products indicating low stock

steps.title: 4. Reports and decisions
steps.description: Analyze movements, best sellers and total inventory value.
steps.imageAlt: Dashboard with inventory and sales reports

items.alt: Low stock alerts in Mi Inventario
items.caption: Automatic restock alerts

items.author: Frederick Pavón, Owner
items.intro: In Masatepe we installed Mi Inventario at Distribuidora Cristal, a business focused on quality for its customers. After 30 minutes of training, the owner was already invoicing with keyboard shortcuts or a barcode scanner and printing a physical receipt when the customer needs one.
items.quote: I used to track finances, inventory and invoices in a notebook. Now we will run everything 100% with Mi Inventario. We will have exact control of sales, stock and profits without digging through papers or notebooks — everything digital, right at our fingertips.
items.closing: Yes, I would recommend it. This way we keep exact inventory from the smallest item to the largest, with full control that works for us and for our customers.
